attributes.title: Quantum Chunk Events - Monitoreo
attributes.description: Dashboard de monitoreo de chunks procesados. Indice: quantum-chunk-events. Campos: chunkId, fileName, status, linesProcessed, linesFailed, processingTimeMs, completedAt, namespace, podName.
